title: Peruvian Stew with Mushrooms
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by Peruvian cuisine, made with sautéed mushrooms and tender beef.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add tomato paste (if using) and cook for another minute.
Add chicken broth, beef broth, and Peruvian pepper (if using).
Return beef to pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until beef is tender, about 2-3 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro (if desired).
